message:
fix(ci): install libsqlite3-dev for lint and test jobs

The lint (clippy) and test jobs need the system SQLite library to link
the test binaries. The build jobs use --no-default-features --features
portable which bundles SQLite via frankensqlite, so they don't need it.

Without this, cargo test --lib fails with:
  rust-lld: error: unable to find library -lsqlite3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,6 +23,9 @@ jobs:
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui ../frankentui
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust ../beads_rust
 
+      - name: Install system dependencies
+        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libsqlite3-dev
+
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           components: rustfmt, clippy
@@ -47,6 +50,9 @@ jobs:
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui ../frankentui
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust ../beads_rust
 
+      - name: Install system dependencies
+        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libsqlite3-dev
+
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
       - name: Run tests
